Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Champions]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Champions are a group mentioned in comparison to the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — The Champions are one of the Imperial Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Champions are raised from an early age on an abusive regimen of training and combat.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Champions are given resistance to poison as one of their many gifts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Champions have hunting parties that are sabotaged by Greenwardens.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Champions are superhuman products of a secret process, trained from birth to be unstoppable in battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Calder feared the Champions might punish him for listening to treason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Champions have remained neutral or possibly disbanded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Champions do not concern themselves with stealth and kill in a straight line to their targets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Champion's Guild has been dissolved, leaving only individual Champions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Champions are the second oldest Imperial Guild, following the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — There are Champions on the deck of the Navigator's ship.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Every member of the Champions' Guild is a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — The Champions could tip the balance of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Champions are a group of people rumored to be high in combat status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Champions are entities that must be fought through.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Champions were attacked by alchemists using gas, darts, traps, and adhesive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Champions do not give up easily.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Champions are individuals built for battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Champions are warriors belonging to Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Three Champions were recently killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Champions have a chapter house on Peregrine street.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Kelarac sent the Champions to save Calder.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Champions entering the fight without Estyr and her Vessels meant an instant defeat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Champions are described as sticky and poisoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Champions require more and stronger drinks than anyone else.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Champions have bodies that adapt differently to alchemical augmentations and Kameira grafts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Champions haven't taken any official Guild actions since shortly after the Emperor’s death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Champions loyal to Calder were being removed as part of a plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The two Champions were gone after the battle.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
